data.title: HYPE briefly broke through 27 USDC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid market data shows that HYPE briefly broke through 27 USDC and is now at 26.848 USDC. 
Earlier news, Hyperliquid officially announced that the HyperEVM mainnet is now online.

data.title: Elon Musk Discusses Open Sourcing Grok3 in Live Broadcast
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk recently addressed questions about the open sourcing of Grok3 during a live broadcast. He stated that the previous version would be open-sourced when the next version is released. Musk indicated that once Grok3 becomes stable, which may take several months, Grok2 will be made available as open source.

data.title: HTX, MEXC, and 4E Exchanges completed the renaming of trading codes from $NEW to $AB, and the AB brand was successfully upgraded
data.description:
Coinlive February 18 – Newton (NEW) has officially rebranded to AB, with HTX, MEXC, and 4E completing the $NEW → $AB ticker change. This milestone signifies a new phase for the AB ecosystem, driving further decentralization, innovation, and global expansion.

Following the rebranding, these exchanges' trading, deposits, and withdrawals have now transitioned to AB, with users' balances remaining unchanged and no action required. Meanwhile, NewSwap, NewMall, Andverse, and NewBridge operate normally within the AB ecosystem. To ensure a smooth user transition, NewPay wallet will temporarily continue displaying NEW, which will be updated to AB in an upcoming upgrade.

According to AB DAO, the ecosystem is set to integrate more applications, further expanding AB token’s real-world utility and driving ecosystem development.

· Important Reminder:
This is a brand upgrade only, and no token swap is required. Please remain cautious of any fraudulent messages regarding token exchanges.

· Official Announcements from Exchanges:
· HTX Official Announcement:  https://www.htx.com/support/74994099627955
· MEXC Official Announcement:  https://www.mexc.com/support/articles/17827791522086
· 4E Official Announcement:  https://www.eeee.com/help-center/en?path=category&lang=en&code=NOTICE&showContent=true&articleId=d9f3c8e2-ace4-4e38-8460-bfd253d31f5a

Additionally, $AB ($NEW) tokens will soon be listed on more exchanges, further expanding global accessibility. Stay tuned for upcoming exchange partnerships and ecosystem development plans.

📌Stay Updated on AB DAO
· Official Website: https://ab.org
· Telegram Community: https://t.me/Newtonproject
· Telegram Channel: https://t.me/AB202528
· X (Twitter): https://x.com/newton_project
· Discord: https://discord.com/invite/BSbgK6JS

data.title: HyperEVM Mainnet is now live
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid officially announced that the HyperEVM mainnet is now online, bringing universal programmability to Hyperliquid's high-performance financial system. The initial release of HyperEVM's mainnet includes: HyperEVM blocks are built as part of L1 execution, inheriting all the security of HyperBFT consensus; spot transfers between native spot HYPE and HyperEVM HYPE; a standardized WHYPE system contract suitable for DeFi applications.

data.title: Musk responded to whether Grok 3 will be open source: the next version will be open source when it is launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: When asked during a live broadcast whether Grok3 would be open source, Musk said that the previous version would be open source when the next version is released, and when Grok3 becomes stable, which may take a few months, Grok2 will be open source. (Jinshi)

SOL falls below 170 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that SOL fell below 170 USDT and is now at 169.94 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 7.93%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has exploded more than 40 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 40.9181 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 40.3584 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 559,700 US dollars.
